scenarios.title: Adopt an existing Memory Side doc system
scenarios.goal: Judge whether the repository is in Bootstrap or Adopt mode and propose the smallest safe entrypoint fixes.
scenarios.user_request: 这个仓库已经有一套 Memory Side 文档体系。请不要重写它，先判断当前更接近 Bootstrap 还是 Adopt，并给出最小的主线入口修补建议。

scenarios.title: Repair missing mainline entrypoints without promoting side material
scenarios.goal: Identify missing or broken mainline entrypoints while keeping archive and exploratory material out of the default path.
scenarios.user_request: 我怀疑 Memory Side 的入口文档还不够完整。请检查主线入口是否缺失或断链，但不要把 ideas、discussion 或 archive 提升为默认入口。

scenarios.title: Route a documentation task with minimal context
scenarios.goal: Produce a minimal Route Card for a Memory Side documentation task without turning it into an execution plan.
scenarios.user_request: 我要继续整理 Memory Side 的说明文档，但先不要直接修改文件。请先给我一张最小 Route Card，告诉我该先读什么、先不要读什么。

scenarios.title: Route a code-adjacent adapter task without whole-repo scanning
scenarios.goal: Produce a minimal Route Card for implementing a local backend adapter runner without defaulting to whole-repo scanning.
scenarios.user_request: 我要继续做 Codex 和 Claude 的无交互 backend adapter runner，请先给我最小 Route Card，尤其要避免整仓扫描。

scenarios.title: Write back verified adapter additions
scenarios.goal: Produce a minimal Writeback Card for a round that already added repo-local wrappers and guide docs.
scenarios.user_request: 本轮已经补了 .agents/.claude wrappers 以及 Codex/Claude guide 和 eval 文档。请先生成最小 Writeback Card，判断哪些事实可以安全回写。

scenarios.title: Refuse premature writeback when evidence is weak
scenarios.goal: Produce a minimal Writeback Card for a round with incomplete verification and clearly separate out what must not be written back.
scenarios.user_request: 这一轮只做了探索和命令确认，还没有充分验证功能。请生成最小 Writeback Card，并明确哪些内容现在不能写回主线。
